title: ARP Action
description: The action object describing what was done. See spec.md §4.

category.description: Action category. Strict verifiers reject unknown values; tolerant verifiers map to 'other' with the original in machine_payload.action_type_label.

human_summary.description: Single-sentence plain-language description in the principal's preferred language. Max 280 Unicode code points.

machine_payload.description: Action-specific structured details. Free-form in v0.1; per-category schemas may be normalized in future versions.

reversal_of_receipt_id.description: UUID of the receipt being reversed. Issuer MUST match the original receipt's issuer.

granted_by_receipt_id.description: UUID of a prior authority_granted receipt that authorizes this action. Strict verifiers MUST check the referenced receipt exists, was emitted by this receipt's principal_did, hasn't expired (per its machine_payload.grant_expires_at), and its machine_payload.granted_scope covers this action's category. v0.1 — see spec §4.6 (Authority chain).

allOf.description: Category 'other' requires machine_payload.action_type_label to be a non-empty string.
Category 'authority_granted' requires machine_payload to declare the grant's scope, the agent receiving it, and an expiration. See spec §4.6.

items.description: Action category the grant authorizes (e.g. 'intent_submitted', 'message_sent', or '*' for any).

granted_scope.description: Action categories this grant authorizes. ['*'] means any category.

granted_to_did.description: did:key of the agent receiving the authority.

grant_expires_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp after which the grant is invalid. Verifiers MUST reject actions referencing an expired grant.

allOf.description: Category 'authority_revoked' requires machine_payload to reference the receipt of the original grant being revoked.

revokes_receipt_id.description: UUID of the original authority_granted receipt being revoked. Issuer MUST match the original grant's principal_did.
